RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTs MARIO S CUELLAR, et al.'s DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Demurrer as to plaintiff Delfina S. - sustained without leave as to 6th, 7th c/a, otherwise overruled.
